parameters.content:
# Lead Gen System v2 — Seamless.AI Version
# ============================================
# Full automation: POC discovery via Seamless.AI API replaces manual input.
# Deploy this workflow AFTER Seamless.AI API credentials are provisioned.
#
# FLOW:
# Step 1: NEW HERE trigger → EE count via Perplexity → update sheet
# Step 2: Filtered trigger → Domain + FP/NP via Perplexity → reformat 5 rows → Apps Script
# Step 4: Seamless.AI trigger (polling) → Contact Search → Seniority Sort → Write 5 POC rows
#         + Revenue/Industry/SIC from first result → Write to POCs sheet
# Step 5: Filtered rowUpdate → LI Profile via Apify (or Seamless liUrl if available)
# Step 6: Address Labels rowUpdate → Corrected Name → Generate labels → Write to Google Docs
#
# SEAMLESS.AI SPECIFICS:
# - Single API call per company (all 14 titles)
# - Two-step: Contact Search → Research/Enrich for emails
# - Seniority sort: 4 categories (Org Head, Finance, Ops, HR) + 1 extra
# - Revenue, Industry, SIC extracted from first contact result
# - Credit consumption: ~2 per company (1 search + 1 research)
#
# SETUP:
# 1. Create HTTP Header Auth credential: Authorization: Bearer YOUR_SEAMLESS_API_KEY
# 2. Set Google Sheets OAuth credential
# 3. Set Perplexity API key credential
# 4. Set Apify API token credential
# 5. Set errorWorkflow to Error Notifier workflow ID
# 6. Verify Apps Script Web App URL
# 7. Replace REPLACE_WITH_SEAMLESS_CREDENTIAL_ID with actual credential ID

## Step 4: Seamless.AI POC Discovery
Trigger: Apps Script polls 'Ready for Seamless.AI' = Yes → fires webhook
→ Contact Search (all 14 titles) → Seniority Sort → 5 POC rows
→ Revenue/Industry/SIC to Filtered sheet → Write POCs sheet

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok', company: $('Validate Webhook Payload').first().json.company_name, seamless_found: $json.seamless_found || false }) }}
